pattern: I open {string} from main menu

pattern: I click on {string} on {string} page
example: When I click on "SAVE_BTN" on "LoginPage" page

example: When I click on "ADD_BTN" in "Header" on "LoginPage" page

example: When I click on "SAVE_BTN"

pattern: I close modal

pattern: I enter {string} in {string} on {string} page

pattern: I enter {string} in {string}

example: When I select "TD_Country" from "COUNTRY_DROPDOWN" on "LoginPage" page

pattern: I select {string} from {string} in modal
example: When I select "TD_Value" from "DROPDOWN" in modal

pattern: I select {string} from {string} and verify {string} is populated with {string} and is {string} on {string} page
example: When I select "TD_Company" from "COMPANY_DD" and verify "LOB_FIELD" is populated with "TD_Lob" and is "disabled" on "LoginPage" page

pattern: I set {string} date to {string} on {string} page
example: When I set "START_DATE" date to "TD_StartDate" on "LoginPage" page

pattern: I set {string} date to {string} in modal
example: When I set "DATE_FIELD" date to "TD_Date" in modal

pattern: I set {string} datetime to {string} on {string} page
example: When I set "DATETIME_FIELD" datetime to "TD_DateTime" on "LoginPage" page

pattern: I set {string} to {string} on {string} page
example: When I set "ACTIVE_TOGGLE" to "TD_ToggleValue" on "LoginPage" page

pattern: I select radio option {string} from {string} on {string} page
example: When I select radio option "TD_Option" from "RADIO_GROUP" on "LoginPage" page

pattern: I set {string} checkbox to {string} on {string} page
example: When I set "AGREE_CHECKBOX" checkbox to "TD_Value" on "LoginPage" page

pattern: I verify element {string} is enabled on {string} page
example: Then I verify element "SAVE_BTN" is enabled on "LoginPage" page

pattern: I verify element {string} is disabled on {string} page
example: Then I verify element "SAVE_BTN" is disabled on "LoginPage" page

pattern: I verify {string} has value {string} and is {string} on {string} page

pattern: I should see the {string} page
example: Then I should see the "LoginPage" page

pattern: I validate message {string} contains {string} from {string} module on {string} page
example: Then I validate message "ERROR_MSG" contains "TD_Error" from "LoginErrorMessage" module on "LoginPage" page

pattern: I validate {string} outcome
example: Then I validate "save" outcome

pattern: I verify toast message {string}
example: Then I verify toast message "Record saved successfully"

pattern: I verify record with {string} = {string} exists in {string} table
example: Then I verify record with "Name" = "TD_Name" exists in "listingTable" table

pattern: I verify first row in {string} table has {string} = {string}
example: Then I verify first row in "listingTable" table has "Name" = "TD_Name"

pattern: I verify record with {string} = {string} has status {string} in {string} table
example: Then I verify record with "Name" = "TD_Name" has status "Active" in "listingTable" table

pattern: I perform {string} action on record with {string} = {string} in {string} table
example: When I perform "Edit" action on record with "Name" = "TD_Name" in "listingTable" table

pattern: I perform {string} action on record with {string} = {string} having status {string} in {string} table
example: When I perform "Approve" action on record with "Name" = "TD_Name" having status "Pending" in "listingTable" table

pattern: I remember value of {string} on {string} page as {string}
example: Then I remember value of "QQ_NUMBER" on "LoginPage" page as "qqNumber"

pattern: I verify {string} on {string} page equals remembered value {string}
example: Then I verify "QQ_NUMBER" on "LoginPage" page equals remembered value "qqNumber"

pattern: I use remembered value {string} in {string} on {string} page
example: Then I use remembered value "qqNumber" in "SEARCH_FIELD" on "LoginPage" page

pattern: I wait for {string} seconds
example: Then I wait for "3" seconds

pattern: I log {string} with status {string}
example: When I log "Step completed" with status "INFO"

pattern: I report step {string} with status {string}
example: Then I report step "Verification passed" with status "PASS"
